allow_redirects.description: A flag which enables or disables HTTP redirection.

auth.description: Keys/values to send as the username and password for Basic Authentication.

cookies.description: Keys/values to send as the request's cookies.

data.description: Keys/values to send as the request's body.

endpoint.description: The endpoint to append to the url built from your inventory/host.

headers.description: Keys/values to send as the request's HTTP headers.

host.description: The name of a host to execute against.

method.description: Request method - one of GET, OPTIONS, HEAD, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE

params.description: Keys/values to convert into the request's query string.

timeout.description: The connect and read timeouts for the request. See: https://docs.python-requests.org/en/latest/user/advanced/#timeouts

verify.description: A flag which enables or disables TLS certificate verification.

host.description: Either hostname or ip address accepted

rpc.description: Name of RPC operation to be executed on the remote device.

config_content.description: The configuration data in xml string format

validate.description: Validate the config updates of the datastore specified in 'target_datastore'

alt_host_keys.description: If `True` host keys will be loaded from the file specified in

alt_key_file.description: SSH host key file to use (if alt_host_keys=True).

auth_timeout.description: Set a timeout (in seconds) to wait for an authentication response.

auto_connect.description: Control whether Netmiko automatically establishes the connection as part of the object creation (default to True).

banner_timeout.description: Set a timeout to wait for the SSH banner (pass to Paramiko).

default_enter.description: Character(s) to send to correspond to enter key (default to \n).

encoding.description: Encoding to be used when writing bytes to the output channel. (default to ascii)

fast_cli.description: Provide a way to optimize for performance. Converts select_delay_factor to select smallest of global and specific. Sets default global_delay_factor to .1 (default to False)

global_delay_factor.description: Multiplication factor affecting Netmiko delays (default to 1).

host.description: hostname or IP address of the netmiko device

keepalive.description: Send SSH keepalive packets at a specific interval, in seconds. Currently defaults to 0, for backwards compatibility (it will not attempt to keep the connection alive).

key_file.description: Filename path of the SSH key file to use.

passphrase.description: Passphrase to use for encrypted key; password will be used for key decryption if not specified.

password.description: Password to authenticate against target device if required.

port.description: The destination port used to connect to the target device.

response_return.description: Character(s) to use in normalized return data to represent enter key (default to \n)

secret.description: The enable password if target device requires one.

session_log.description: File path or BufferedIOBase subclass object to write the session log to.

session_log_file_mode.description: write or append for session_log file mode (default to write)

session_log_record_writes.description: The session log generally only records channel reads due to eliminate command duplication due to command echo. You can enable this if you want to record both channel reads and channel writes in the log (default to False).

session_timeout.description: Set a timeout for parallel requests.

ssh_config_file.description: File name of OpenSSH configuration file.

ssh_strict.description: Automatically reject unknown SSH host keys (default to False, which means unknown SSH host keys will be accepted)

system_host_keys.description: Load host keys from the users known_hosts file.

use_keys.description: Connect to target device using SSH keys.

username.description: Username to authenticate against target device if required.

verbose.description: Enable additional messages to standard output.

cmd_verify.description: Verify command echo before proceeding (default to True).

command_string.description: The command to be executed on the remote device

delay_factor.description: Multiplying factor used to adjust delays (default to 1).

expect_string.description: Regular expression pattern to use for determining end of output. If left blank will default to being based on router prompt.

max_loops.description: Controls wait time in conjunction with delay_factor. Will default to be based upon the timeout in netmiko device

normalize.description: Ensure the proper enter is sent at end of command (default to True).

strip_command.description: Remove the echo of the command from the output (default to True).

strip_prompt.description: Remove the trailing router prompt from the output (default to True).

textfsm_template.description: Name of template to parse output with; can be fully qualified path, relative path, or name of file in current directory. (default to None).

ttp_template.description: Name of template to parse output with; can be fully qualified path, relative path, or name of file in current directory. (default to None).

use_genie.description: Process command output through PyATS/Genie parser (default to False).

use_textfsm.description: Process command output through TextFSM template (default to False).

use_ttp.description: Process command output through TTP template (default to False).

requestBody.description:
Netmiko's host/ip parameters are condensed to only host which allows hostname or ip.
See base_connection for all other supported connection parameters:
https://ktbyers.github.io/netmiko/docs/netmiko/base_connection.html
See send_command for all supported command execution parameters:
https://ktbyers.github.io/netmiko/docs/netmiko/index.html#netmiko.BaseConnection.send_command
